report.score_location: main active baseball monitor card header as the largest visual anchor (`game-monitor-score`)

inning_outs_bases_location.inning: header live-state pills under the score
inning_outs_bases_location.outs: header live-state pills under the score
inning_outs_bases_location.balls_strikes: header live-state pills under the score when available
inning_outs_bases_location.bases: prominent baseball diamond + runners line inside the baseball-state block of the main card

report.pitcher_location: main card header detail line (`monitor-pitcher`) directly beneath live game state pills when available
report.side_outcome_location: main active card in both the action pill and the baseball-state detail line as the held WIN/LOSE outcome
report.committed_equity_unrealized_location: trade/accounting block on the right side of the main hybrid card, via stat boxes for Committed, Live Equity, and Unrealized
report.verification_note: At verification time there were 0 open trades, so semantic wiring remains intact but live accounting could not be checked against an actually open position in this exact snapshot.

notes: This pass increased baseball-state prominence without altering the stabilized truth model.
